markets.question: Spread: Birmingham City FC (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game, scheduled for April 6 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Birmingham City FC" if Birmingham City FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Ipswich Town FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Ipswich Town FC vs. Birmingham City FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the EFL Championship game, scheduled for April 6 at 10:00 AM ET.

markets.question: Game Handicap: V7 (-1.5) vs AdvoGatos (+1.5)
markets.description:
This market refers to the Rainbow Six Siege Upper bracket quarterfinal 4 match between Vince Seven Esports and AdvoGatos in the South America League Challenger Series Playoffs, initially scheduled for March 12 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Vince Seven Esports" if Vince Seven Esports wins 2 or more games than AdvoGatos in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "AdvoGatos". 

Games won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the handicap, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching game being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: Rainbow Six Siege: Vince Seven Esports vs AdvoGatos (BO3) - South America League Challenger Series Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Rainbow Six Siege Upper bracket quarterfinal 4 match between Vince Seven Esports and AdvoGatos in the South America League Challenger Series Playoffs, initially scheduled for March 12 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Vince Seven Esports" if Vince Seven Esports win the match against AdvoGatos.

This market will resolve to "AdvoGatos" if AdvoGatos win the match against Vince Seven Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.description:

markets.description:

markets.question: HYPE Up or Down - March 12, 7AM ET
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the HYPE/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the HYPE/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/futures/HYPEUSDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance HYPE/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.
